creator: ryao@gentoo.org
text:
On 04/05/2013 06:08 PM, Juergen Lock wrote:
> Hm I totally missed the gentoo patch Richard Yao sent,
> 
> 	http://sources.gentoo.org/cgi-bin/viewvc.cgi/gentoo-x86/sys-boot/grub/files/grub-2.00-zfs-feature-flag-support.patch
> 
> is it also needed if using libzfs directly?
> 
>  Thanx,
> 	Juergen
> 

The patch modifies the boot code installed into the BIOS Boot Partition.
Without that modification, GRUB2 will print an error message saying that
it encountered an unsupported version of ZFS.
